zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie於1522年出生在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪時，他的父親Robert Munro 14th Baron of Fowlis19歲，母親Lady Margaret Anna Dunbar19歲。他於1550年與Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1596年在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭阿希特享年74歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie于1522年出生在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪时，他的父亲Robert Munro 14th Baron of Fowlis19岁，母亲Lady Margaret Anna Dunbar19岁。他于1550年与Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1596年在苏格兰薩瑟蘭阿希特享年74岁，埋葬在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪。

nameMeanings.name: Munro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic Rothach ‘man from Ro’. According to tradition which may be substantially correct, the ancestors of the Munros came from Ireland, from the foot of the river Roe in Derry, whence the name Bun-rotha, giving Mun-rotha by eclipsis of b after the preposition in’. See also Monroe , compare Munroe .
History: This (see 1 above) is the name of a Scottish clan with an ancestral seat at Foulis Castle, near Evanton, Ross-shire.

variants.name: Mulroy
meanings: Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolruaidh ‘descendant of Maolruadh’, a personal name composed of the elements maol ‘chief’ + ruadh ‘red’, i.e. ‘red-haired chieftain’. This surname, from has sometimes been changed to Munroe (see Munro ).

variants.name: Monroe
meanings: History: Scottish bearers of this name are descended from Donald O’Kane, who in the 11th century migrated from the mouth of the Roe to Ferrindonald in Cromarty, Scotland. There his descendants, as barons of Foulis and vassals of the earls of Ross, held lands along the Firth of Cromarty. James Monroe (1758–1831), 5th president of the US (1817–25), came from a cadet branch of this family.

variants.name: Munroe
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Munro  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie was born in 1522, in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, his father, Robert Munro 14th Baron of Fowlis, was 19 and his mother, Lady Margaret Anna Dunbar, was 19. He married Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale in 1550, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1596, in Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland, at the age of 74, and was buried in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie est né en 1522, à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Munro 14th Baron of Fowlis, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Anna Dunbar, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale en 1550, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1596, à Assynt, Sutherland, Écosse, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie 1522 in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Munro 14th Baron of Fowlis 19 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Anna Dunbar 19. Er hat 1550 in Schottland, United Kingdom Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1596 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland und wurde in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie è nato il nel 1522 nel Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert Munro 14th Baron of Fowlis, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Anna Dunbar, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale nel 1550, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1596, nel Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconieが1522年にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアクロマルトイで生まれた時，父Robert Munro 14th Baron of Fowlisは19歳，母Lady Margaret Anna Dunbarは19歳であった。1550年にイギリススコットランドでChristina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1596年にスコットランドススエルランドアシントで74歳で死去し，スコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアクロマルトイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie(이)가 1522년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Munro 14th Baron of Fowlis(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Anna Dunbar(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1550년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1596년 스컷랜드 서덜랜드 아시트에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie nasceu em 1522, em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Munro 14th Baron of Fowlis, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Anna Dunbar, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale em 1550, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1596, em Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie родился в 1522 г. в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert Munro 14th Baron of Fowlis было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Anna Dunbar, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale в 1550 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1596 г. в местности ассинт, сутирланд, Шотландия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Munro of Fowlis - 1st Munro of Assynt and Inchcoulter, now Balconie nació en 1522, en Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert Munro 14th Baron of Fowlis, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Anna Dunbar, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Christina-nic-Robert Munro of Carbisdale en 1550, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1596, en Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland.
